## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of Change

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Website content
- [ ] Guide or documentation
- [ ] Map, analyzer, or observed-activity work
- [ ] Layout, styling, or accessibility
- [ ] Discord join route or tracking
- [ ] Repository maintenance
- [ ] Security or privacy correction
- [ ] Other

## Main Files Changed

List the main pages, templates, data files, or assets changed.

## Review Checklist

Check the items relevant to this change:

- [ ] The content matches the current state of the project.
- [ ] Active services are not described as planned or unavailable.
- [ ] Wording does not imply complete coverage or ownership of independent nodes.
- [ ] No credentials, private messages, sensitive access details, or exact non-public locations are exposed.
- [ ] Links and asset paths point to current files and services.
- [ ] No links to deleted or retired pages were added.
- [ ] Related navigation, sitemap, metadata, or documentation was updated where needed.
- [ ] MeshMapper is not presented as a Meshtastic field-testing tool.

## Website Checks

For website changes:

- [ ] Desktop and mobile layouts were checked.
- [ ] Links and navigation were tested.
- [ ] YAML, Liquid, HTML, or CSS syntax was checked where applicable.
- [ ] Images have appropriate alt text.
- [ ] Keyboard navigation and visible focus were checked.
- [ ] Browser-console errors were reviewed.
- [ ] `css_version` was updated if `style.css` changed.
- [ ] Discord buttons use an appropriate `/join/` route.
- [ ] Any new join route was added to `_includes/discord-cta.html`.

## Testing Notes

Describe what was tested and note any known limitations.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots when they help explain a visual change.

Remove credentials, private messages, administrative pages, and exact non-public locations before posting screenshots.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call attention to anything that needs additional review or testing.
